reviews.author: Pat Pointer
reviews.text: Very thorough inspection. Listened to my concerns in a professional, friendly manner. They responded the next day to my concerns for a request to assess and treat our pest (rat) situation. I highly recommend this service.

reviews.author: Candace Key
reviews.text: We love Sono-Marin Pest! We switched over from Hitmen several years ago and couldn't be happier with the service we now receive. Morgan is so thoughtful and helpful. Everyone we deal with at Sono-Marin is kind and considerate of our time.

reviews.author: Jessica Nieto
reviews.text: Sono-Marin Pest Solutions I would call back in a heartbeat. Their team was so easy to work with. Friendly informative and hard workers. Thank you for taking care of our rat situation!

reviews.author: Mia Simon
reviews.text: Some of the best customer service I've ever encountered. Called and was able to get an appointment within 48 hours. Tyler came out and handled all subsequent visits. Super friendly and educational. Reasonable pricing. Did NOT try to upsell. Highly recommend!!

reviews.author: Christine Dunn
reviews.text: I have been using Sono-Marin Pest services for 6+ years. They are great! Dylan the owner is very nice and Morgan the tech does a great job.
